policy_issues.description: The title contains the word 'best', which is a prohibited claim under Amazon policy.
policy_issues.suggestion: Remove 'best' from the title. Use descriptive terms like 'high-quality' or 'premium' instead.

policy_issues.description: Bullet points include promotional language such as 'limited time offer', which is not allowed in standard listings.
policy_issues.suggestion: Remove promotional phrases like 'limited time offer' from bullet points. Keep them factual and feature-focused.

policy_issues.description: The description makes a medical claim stating the product 'cures headaches', which is not allowed unless the product is in an approved medical category.
policy_issues.suggestion: Remove the claim 'cures headaches'. If applicable, rephrase to 'may help relieve tension' or similar non-medical language, and ensure compliance with Amazon's health claims policy.

policy_issues.description: The title uses all caps for some words, which violates Amazon's formatting guidelines.
policy_issues.suggestion: Convert all caps words to standard capitalization. Only proper nouns should be capitalized.

critical_items: [Policy] The title contains the word 'best', which is a prohibited claim under Amazon policy.
[Policy] The description makes a medical claim stating the product 'cures headaches', which is not allowed unless the product is in an approved medical category.
action_items: Remove 'best' from the title. Use descriptive terms like 'high-quality' or 'premium' instead.
Remove promotional phrases like 'limited time offer' from bullet points. Keep them factual and feature-focused.
Remove the claim 'cures headaches'. If applicable, rephrase to 'may help relieve tension' or similar non-medical language, and ensure compliance with Amazon's health claims policy.
Convert all caps words to standard capitalization. Only proper nouns should be capitalized.

top_alerts.content: Arrived damaged. The box was crushed.
Color doesn't match the photos. Returning it.
